text.p: Just reading this 5.40am here. Then think of marrying him for permanent – am serious! Have a great day.

Great! Senate is tomorrow - that's where and when the decision to call students back will be taken. Good for you - re expensive. And congratulations on being a house owner. Am interested in how your movement will affect your relationtionship with - you should be together!

Dont give up just yet - that's very unlike you. Perhaps the people in may work things to accommodate your visit. Keep your fingers crossed. Re - you seem to be so mobile - what about your projects in or you arent palnning to take the job?

Many thanks - but I want to see what my salary looks like before I rejoice. Yes, I'm relieved it's over. We hope to ask students to return in a week or so but our three months salaries should be paid. And howre you doing? ? Work?
Will see what we can do with . Yes we've started lectures and I need a 48 hour day to catch my breath!
Have a great week and merry Xmas and healthy, prosperous 2010 in advance
Many thanks. Have a wonderful Xmas and a prosperous but healthy 2010. Yes, we'll break for Xmas on 24/12, back to work 28/12 with another break on 31/12 till Jan 4.

Congratulations! The year has started well. Do have a safe trip to . I would have liked to visit you there but I'll be in Ethiopia March 1-6. Will call you when am back - send a mail so I know your local phone number. Great that is travelling with you - more fun that way!
